title: Government response to the OEP review: environmental inspections and their implementation in England
body: "On 10 July 2025, the Office for Environmental Protection (OEP) published Environmental inspections in England - case studies on selected laws and their implementation.  The government is required to respond to the OEP’s report under section 29 of the Environment Act.  The OEP’s report contains 8 recommendations. These highlight the importance of transparency, consistency and evidence-based practice in inspection regimes. We have set out our response to each recommendation.  "
